ayahs.translation: When the earth is shaken with its [final] earthquake
And the earth discharges its burdens[1962]
And man says,[1963] "What is [wrong] with it?" -
That Day, it will report its news
Because your Lord has inspired [i.e., commanded] it.

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَئِذٍ يَصْدُرُ ٱلنَّاسُ أَشْتَاتًا لِّيُرَوْا۟ أَعْمَـٰلَهُمْ
ayahs.translation: That Day, the people will depart[1964] separated [into categories] to be shown [the result of] their deeds.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ خَيْرًا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.translation: So whoever does an atom's weight[1965] of good will see it,

ayahs.arabic: وَمَن يَعْمَلْ مِثْقَالَ ذَرَّةٍ شَرًّا يَرَهُۥ
ayahs.translation: And whoever does an atom's weight of evil will see it.
